Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种OCR引擎和MLLM在扫描文档文本识别上的表现，并提出了一个无需标注的自动评估框架DocOCR-Eval，通过三阶段校正与排序策略近似人工排序，实验证明在标注稀缺场景下能可靠地选择OCR工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OCR引擎和MLLM众多，但在标签稀缺场景下如何为特定文档集选择合适的文档解析方案仍缺乏系统性指导。

Method: 提出DocOCR-Eval框架，采用三阶段校正与排序策略，无需真实标签即可对OCR工具进行自动评估与排序，并通过聚合多个MLLM的结果逐步提升与基于标注的排序一致性。

Result: 在多个跨领域、跨语言的扫描文档基准上，DocOCR-Eval能够有效逼近基于人工标注的工具排序，且聚合多个MLLM可渐进式提升排序对齐度。

Conclusion: 在真实且标注有限的场景下，能够可靠地选择OCR工具，为实际文档解析系统的部署提供了实用指导。

Abstract: Document parsing is a foundational step for document understanding tasks such as visual question answering and key information extraction, as it transforms unstructured scanned images into structured representations by extracting textual, visual, and layout information. While numerous Optical Character Recognition (OCR) engines and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been developed for this purpose, selecting an appropriate document parsing solution for a given document collection remains challenging, particularly in label-scarce settings. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of text recognition performance across a diverse set of OCR engines and state-of-the-art MLLMs on multiple scanned document benchmarks spanning different domains and languages. Motivated by the limited contextual reasoning capabilities of many OCR engines and the high cost of manual annotations, we propose DocOCR-Eval, an annotation-free evaluation framework for automatic OCR assessment and selection. DocOCR-Eval employs a three-staged correction and ranking strategy to approximate annotation-based tool ordering without ground-truth labels. We show that aggregating across multiple MLLMs progressively improves alignment with annotation-based rankings. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that reliable OCR tool selection can be achieved in realistic, label-limited settings, providing practical guidance for deploying document parsing systems across diverse real-world document collections.

</details>


### [372] [Fully-sensorized smart-eyewear platform for on-device Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16222)
*Andrea Giudici,Christian Veronesi,Pietro Bartoli,Mario Caliò,Aurelio Teliti,Giacomo Gervasoni,Diana Trojaniello,Franco Zappa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ARGO是一款基于STM32N6微控制器和NPU的智能眼镜平台，通过软硬件协同设计部署优化后的YOLOv11模型（含HPA改进），在仅有2.483MB内存占用下实现实时城市障碍物识别，功耗低至200mAh电池可持续约113分钟，达到10FPS处理速度，兼顾隐私保护、舒适性和高性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能眼镜方案依赖云端处理导致延迟高、隐私泄露风险大，且硬件平台难以在舒适性、计算吞吐量和能效之间取得平衡。

Method: 采用STM32N6微控制器及集成NPU实现端侧ML；提出Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA)优化YOLOv11以适应NPU架构；多模态传感器融合（RGB相机、ToF、麦克风等）；在WOTR数据集上训练和部署。

Result: mAP50-95达24，内存占用仅2.483MB；10FPS实时处理；200mAh电池续航约113分钟。

Conclusion: 证明了高性能、隐私保护且社会可接受的辅助设备的可行性，强调竞争性边缘AI解决方案需要紧密集成的多学科协同设计方法。

Abstract: This paper presents ARGO, a smart eyewear platform designed to bridge ergonomic comfort, high computational throughput, and energy efficiency. Unlike cloud-dependent solutions, ARGO leverages the STM32N6 microcontroller and its integrated Neural Processing Unit (NPU) to enable on-device machine learning, minimizing latency and preserving user privacy through local data processing. The primary contribution lies in the holistic co-design of hardware, firmware, and artificial intelligence, centered on the deployment of an optimized YOLOv11 model for real-time urban obstacle recognition. To ensure compatibility with the target NPU, we introduce Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA), an architectural refinement that enables efficient accelerator execution while preserving the original computational logic. The model is trained on the Walking On The Road (WOTR) dataset, and the final deployed configuration achieves an mAP50-95 of 24 under strict memory constraints, with a memory footprint of only 2.483 MB. The platform integrates a multimodal sensor suite, RGB cameras, Time-of-Flight sensors, microphones, and ambient sensors, and delivers 10 FPS at a continuous autonomy of ~113 minutes on a 200 mAh battery. These results demonstrate the feasibility of a high-performance, privacy-preserving, and socially acceptable assistive device, and highlight how competitive edge AI solutions increasingly demand tightly integrated, multidisciplinary co-design approaches.

</details>


### [373] [LLM Unlearning for Cyber Defense: A Survey on Methods, Challenges, and Emerging Threats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16227)
*Ruppikha Sree Shankar,Abhishek Bhardwaj,Arnav Doshi,Anusri Nagarajan,Troy Paulus Asia,Saptarshi Sengupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文综述了大语言模型（LLM）中机器遗忘（unlearning）的研究，重点探讨基于梯度的方法能否真正移除知识而非仅抑制知识表达，以及其在安全、鲁棒性和可验证遗忘方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM无法遗忘导致隐私泄露、版权侵权、安全风险等严峻问题，而重新训练开销巨大，因此需要有效的机器遗忘方法作为网络防御手段。

Method: 以基于梯度的方法为主要对象，从安全、鲁棒性和可验证遗忘三个维度对现有LLM遗忘技术进行系统性综述。

Result: 指出了当前方法的核心争议：是否真正移除了知识，还是仅抑制了在常规提示下的知识表达。

Conclusion: LLM遗忘问题已从理论探讨走向现实威胁，基于梯度的方法因兼容性好、可扩展性强成为主流，但知识移除的真实有效性仍需进一步验证。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly deployed in security-critical systems across healthcare, finance, education, and decision support, yet their inability to forget creates serious cybersecurity, privacy, and safety risks. Sensitive personal information, copyrighted material, hazardous domain knowledge, and memorized training data remain encoded across billions of parameters long after deployment, leaving models vulnerable to extraction, jailbreak attacks, membership inference, and regulatory non-compliance. Real-world incidents, from chatbots regenerating private information to fabricated legal citations producing direct legal and financial cost, place the problem at the center of the emerging-threats landscape rather than the realm of speculation. Because retraining billion-parameter models on revised corpora is computationally infeasible, and because knowledge within an LLM is distributed and entangled across parameters rather than localized to identifiable units, LLM unlearning has emerged as the principal cyber defense response, aiming to remove or suppress targeted knowledge from a trained model without retraining and without eroding what the model should still know. A central question, however, remains unresolved. Do current methods genuinely remove knowledge, or do they only stop the model from expressing it under ordinary prompting conditions? This survey examines LLM unlearning through the lens of security, robustness, and verifiable forgetting, with primary focus on gradient-based methods, which have come to dominate the field due to their compatibility with existing training pipelines and their scalability to billion-parameter models.

</details>


### [374] [Operator-Aware Mixed-Precision Tolerance Calibration for Tensor Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16228)
*Dipankar Sarkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过挖掘GPU云运行数据，提出基于误差分布校准的绝对容差方法，将容差收紧最多2184倍，并将LLM风格bug检测召回率提升9.3个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前张量核正确性测试使用固定形状的all-close检查，容差阈值在语料库中随意复制且很少重新审视，缺乏数据驱动的校准方法。

Method: 从26个gpuemu语料库和2种dtype（共8076行结果）中挖掘每个测试用例的元素级误差分布，提出基于正确实现下误差分布校准绝对容差的方法。

Result: 容差最大收紧2184倍（attention_triton fp16）；在7个LLM风格bug变体上，bug检测召回率从73.2%提升至82.4%（绝对提升9.3个百分点，新增229个检测），假阳性率仅增加1.1个百分点。

Conclusion: 基于数据驱动的容差校准方法比人工预设容差更有效，能显著提升LLM风格bug检测能力且假阳性可控。

Abstract: Most tensor-kernel correctness tests go through a fixed-shape all close-style check with hand-picked absolute and relative tolerances. The thresholds are copied across the corpus and rarely revisited. We mine the element-wise error distribution of every test case from accumulated cloud GPU runs across the 26-entry gpuemu corpus and 2 dtypes (8,076 result rows). We then ask one empirical question: what absolute tolerance would the kernel itself, observed under its correct implementation, justify?
  The answer is much tighter than the current hand-picked atol. The largest tightening is attention_triton fp16 at $2{,}184\times$. Restricted to the seven LLM-style buggy variants for which the corpus ships a paired correct counterpart, calibrated per-(op, dtype) tolerances raise bug-detection recall from 73.2% (1,805 of 2,467) to 82.4% (2,034 of 2,467), an absolute gain of 9.3 percentage points (+229 new detections). The control false-positive count rises from 0 to 20 out of 1,882 correct-control cases (+1.1 percentage points).

</details>


### [375] [RouteCost: A Production-Inspired Multi-Stage Framework for Pre-Order Shipping Cost Estimation in E-Commerce](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16230)
*Xianling Zeng,Zihan Yu,Sichen Zhao,Yalun Qi,Zhiming Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RouteCost框架，通过多阶段分解（需求预测、基准定价、残差修正、包裹合并推断）来精确估计电商运输成本，在25万+订单和260个产品上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电商中运输成本受距离、目的地需求组合、计费重量、体积定价、附加费触发以及包裹合并等潜在运营效应影响，静态查找表和单一回归器方法无法准确估计。

Method: 提出RouteCost多阶段框架：1）时间感知需求预测；2）基于费率卡的基准定价；3）第二阶段残差校正；4）基于代理的箱体合并推断。最后通过路线加权期望聚合得到产品级运输成本预测。

Result: 在250,000+订单、260个产品、18个月数据上，RouteCost提升了预测质量和整体校准度，同时保持了路线级别的可解释性。

Conclusion: 多阶段分解方法优于静态查找表和单一回归器，能有效捕捉运输成本的复杂变化因素。

Abstract: Accurate pre-order shipping cost estimation is important in e-commerce because it affects price presentation, margin planning, and conversion. In practice, shipping cost is shaped not only by distance but also by destination demand mix, billable weight, dimensional pricing, surcharge triggers, and latent operational effects such as shipment consolidation. Static lookup methods therefore miss important sources of variation, while monolithic regressors may exploit strong but non-causal correlations. We propose RouteCost, a production-inspired multi-stage framework that decomposes the problem into time-aware demand forecasting, fee-card-informed baseline pricing, Stage 2 residual correction, and proxy-based box-consolidation inference. Route-level cost estimates are aggregated through a route-weighted expectation formulation to produce product-level shipping cost predictions. Across over 250,000 orders, 260 products, and 18 months of order history, the framework improves predictive quality and aggregate calibration while preserving route-level interpretability.

</details>


### [376] [Orthogonal Gradient Constraints Shape Noisy-Label Memorization Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16231)
*Richard Mai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究 OrthoGrad 方法（去除梯度中平行于权重的分量）在噪声标签图像分类中的正则化效果，发现其在小数据场景有效，但在大数据场景和长时间训练后仍会过拟合噪声标签。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索通过优化器更新的几何干预（而非传统正则化方法）来缓解神经网络对噪声标签的过度记忆。

Method: 采用 OrthoGrad 方法，在每次梯度更新时移除当前权重向量方向上的梯度分量，在 MNIST 小数据场景和 CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 上评估效果。

Result: OrthoGrad 在 MNIST 小数据 CNN 上提升测试准确率、降低噪声标签拟合；但在 CIFAR-10 大数据场景下仅改变记忆轨迹，无法阻止最终的噪声标签记忆。

Conclusion: 正交更新约束可作为学习动力学诊断工具，但其正则化效果具有数据规模依赖性，并非通用正则化方法。

Abstract: Modern neural networks can fit corrupted training labels, making noisy-label learning a useful setting for studying memorization-driven overfitting. Most regularization methods modify the objective, architecture, or data distribution; here we instead study a geometric intervention on the optimizer update itself. We evaluate OrthoGrad, which removes the component of each weight gradient parallel to the current weight vector, in noisy-label image classification. On MNIST with small-data regimes, OrthoGrad improves test accuracy most clearly for CNNs while reducing corrupted-label fitting. Mechanism diagnostics based on weight norms and gradient-weight cosine similarity suggest that the projection has the strongest effect when the raw gradient contains a nontrivial radial component, and becomes weaker in larger-data regimes where gradients are already nearly orthogonal to weights. Additional CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 experiments show that the method can alter memorization trajectories but does not prevent eventual noisy-label memorization. These results support orthogonal update constraints as a useful diagnostic for studying learning dynamics, while showing that OrthoGrad is regime-dependent rather than universally regularizing.

</details>


### [377] [From Weights to Words: Expressing and Editing Preference Model Inferences in Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16232)
*Zachary Wojtowicz,Ayush Nayak,Jacob Andreas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为"weights to words"的方法，能从高维选择数据中自动发现用自然语言描述的偏好维度，解决偏好学习中的欠确定性和黑箱问题，并通过人类实验证明其能提高预测准确率并支持用户实时检查和编辑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 统计学习算法从高维选择数据推断人类偏好时面临两个挑战：选择选项在多个维度上同时不同，难以确定哪些因素真正驱动了决策；且模型不透明，用户无法检查、质疑或纠正错误。

Method: 提出"weights to words"方法，从选择问题数据集中自动发现一组领域相关的偏好维度，每个维度用自然语言描述并与模型表示空间中的向量对应，可应用于归因并外化模型推理，支持用户实时检查和编辑。

Result: 在四个领域（道德困境、电影、葡萄酒、LLM回答）定性展示了方法的普适性；两项预注册人类实验（道德困境N=450，电影选择N=449）表明：(1)将偏好模型向学习到的基正则化可提高预测精度；(2)纳入参与者的结构化编辑进一步提高精度；参与者在头对头比较中更偏好该方法推断的偏好画像并认可其预测更准确。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了偏好学习中的欠确定性和黑箱问题，通过自然语言偏好维度提高了模型可解释性和预测准确性，并支持人机协作编辑。

Abstract: The growing use of statistical learning algorithms to infer human preferences from high-dimensional choice data runs up against a fundamental challenge: choice alternatives typically differ in many ways simultaneously, so it is generally unclear which factors actually drove an observed decision and should be credited as preferences. Compounding this problem, the opacity of these methods leaves human operators unable to inspect, contest, or correct models when they err. We introduce \emph{weights to words}, a method that takes a dataset of choice problems as input and automatically discovers a collection of domain-relevant preference dimensions, each described in natural language and paired with a vector in the model's representational space. These dimensions address both under-determination and opacity: they can be applied to concentrate attribution on a small set of meaningful factors, and they can externalize the model's inferences in natural language so that users can inspect and edit them in real time. We first qualitatively illustrate the method's versatility on four diverse domains: moral dilemmas, movies, wines, and free-form LLM responses. We then report two pre-registered human-subjects experiments, on moral dilemmas ($N=450$) and movie selection ($N=449$), that demonstrate its benefits for learning preference models: (1) regularizing a preference model toward the learned basis increases prediction accuracy on held-out choices, and (2) incorporating participants' structured edits further improves accuracy. In head-to-head comparisons, participants prefer the method's inferred preference profiles and endorse its predictions as more accurate.

</details>


### [378] [Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16233)
*Suxing Liu Byungwon Min*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的多模态融合方法，通过细粒度标记交互和联合优化目标，解决癌症亚型分类和生存预测中的跨模态整合问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将每个模态视为整体特征向量，无法进行细粒度标记级交互；跨模态融合依赖线性加权或后期平均，缺乏结构化标记交换；生存预测与分类目标独立优化，缺少联合正则化信号。

Method: 提出结构化标记交换机制实现细粒度跨模态交互，并设计联合优化框架同时优化分类和生存预测目标。

Result: 在癌症多模态数据上实现了更优的亚型分类和生存预测性能。

Conclusion: 通过细粒度标记交互和联合优化，有效提升了多模态癌症分析的效果。

Abstract: Integrating heterogeneous genomic and clinical modalities for joint cancer subtype classification and survival prediction remains a key challenge in precision oncology. Existing approaches suffer from three limitations: (1) they treat each modality as a monolithic feature vector, precluding fine-grained token-level interactions across modalities; (2) cross-modal fusion is typically performed through linear weighting or late averaging rather than structured token exchange; and (3) survival and classification objectives are optimized independently, missing a joint regularization signal.

</details>


### [379] [HantaWatch: Federated Learning for Hantavirus Genomic Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16234)
*Shanika Iroshi Nanayakkara,Shiva Raj Pokhrel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了HantaWatch，一个面向汉坦病毒基因组监测的联邦学习框架，能够在各实验室间协作训练模型而不共享原始数据，支持高风险筛查、爆发关联预测、进化枝分类和临床症候分类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汉坦病毒基因组监测受限于序列数据分布不均、非独立同分布的数据源异质性以及有限的专家审查能力，亟需一种既能保护数据隐私又能协同训练的解决方案。

Method: HantaWatch框架包括：k-mer特征提取、源感知联邦客户端构建、自适应DU-FedProx优化、监测专用模型选择以及仅预测分流机制。

Result: 在二分类和多分类任务上，HantaWatch在高风险筛查、爆发关联预测、进化枝分类和临床症候分类方面表现良好，平衡了预测性能、假阴性风险和更新稳定性。

Conclusion: HantaWatch为去中心化的汉坦病毒监测提供了实用的联邦决策支持层，能够辅助专家优先级排序，但不替代实验室或公共卫生解释。

Abstract: Hantavirus genomic surveillance is limited by the distribution of sequence data, non-IID source heterogeneity, and constrained expert-review capacity. We propose HantaWatch, a federated learning framework that enables laboratories and surveillance sites to collaboratively train sequence-based models without sharing raw data. HantaWatch integrates k-mer feature extraction, source-aware federated client construction, adaptive DU-FedProx optimization, surveillance-specific model selection, and prediction-only triage. Experiments on binary and multi-class tasks show that HantaWatch supports high-risk screening, outbreak-associated prediction, clade classification, and clinical-syndrome categorization while balancing predictive performance, false-negative risk, and update stability. The framework converts model output into risk scores, confidence estimates, uncertainty flags, and ranked expert-review priorities. HantaWatch therefore provides a practical federated decision-support layer for decentralized Hantavirus surveillance, supporting expert prioritization without replacing laboratory or public-health interpretation.

</details>


### [380] [OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16235)
*Narayan Schuetz,Yuze Bai,Lianggang Pan,Edgar Eggert,Favour Nerrise,Juan Delgado-SanMartin,Max Rosenblattl,Milana Gurbanova,Mohammad Asadi,Anders Johnson,Paul Schmiedmayer,Dennis Wang,Allan Lawrie,Daniel Seung Kim,Xin Liu,Akshay Paruchuri,Ehsan Adeli,Euan Ashley,Kelly W. Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发布了迄今为止最大规模的开源可穿戴健康数据集OpenMHC，包含超过6000万小时、19个传感器通道的数据，并开源了可穿戴基础模型的实现与基准测试框架，旨在推动可穿戴健康AI的开放研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 最大的可穿戴数据集和基础模型通常不公开或不开源，阻碍了可穿戴健康领域的开放科学进展。

Method: 从My Heart Counts研究App中整理超过十年的数据，构建OpenMHC数据集；开源多个可穿戴基础模型实现；提出统一基准，涵盖下游预测、多变量数据插补和时间序列预测三个任务。

Result: OpenMHC包含来自11,894名参与者的超过6000万小时可穿戴数据，涵盖19个传感器通道和多达169个关联变量。

Conclusion: 通过开源数据、代码和模型权重，旨在推动可穿戴健康AI研究的民主化和社区驱动的开放进步。

Abstract: Mobile and wearable devices offer an unprecedented opportunity for continuous, passive health monitoring and active health coaching. However, the largest wearable datasets are not publicly available for research, and leading wearable foundation models trained on such datasets are rarely open-weight or come with reproducible training code. To accelerate open science in wearable health, we release OpenMyHeartCounts (OpenMHC), the largest and most comprehensive open-access wearable health dataset to date, alongside open-source implementations of recent wearable foundation models. OpenMHC, derived from over a decade of data collected through the My Heart Counts study app, includes >60 million hours of wearable data across 19 sensor channels (e.g., step count, heart rate, sleep, workouts) and up to 169 linked variables, including health, lifestyle, mood, and behavior from 11,894 consenting participants. Furthermore, we introduce a unified, open benchmark that enables standardized comparison of wearable health models across three tracks: health and behavior downstream prediction, multivariate data imputation, and time-series forecasting. We benchmark classical methods alongside recent wearable and multivariate time series foundation models. By open-sourcing data, code, and model weights at this unprecedented scale, we aim to democratize wearable health AI research and enable the community to drive open progress in this domain.

</details>


### [381] [The Failures of Marginal Influence-Based Attribution Methods for Global Time Series Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16236)
*Amadeo Tunyi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有时间序列可解释方法存在计算失配问题，无法忠实反映时间DAG结构，因此需要定义DAG忠实性标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列模型的解释方法主要生成标量归因分数，但其计算方式（边际条件或离流形梯度）在自相关情况下混淆了直接与间接时间依赖关系，导致解释不准确。

Method: 论文定义了DAG忠实性概念，即解释编码的时间依赖图应与模型隐式学习的时间有向无环图（DAG）马尔可夫等价。通过分析SHAP等标准归因方法及其时间序列扩展，证明它们普遍不满足DAG忠实性。

Result: 证明了现有方法的主要失败模式不是标量格式本身，而是计算失配；SHAP及其时间序列扩展均不满足DAG忠实性。

Conclusion: 需要设计新的时间序列解释方法，使其能够忠实反映模型内在的时间因果结构，而非仅仅生成标量归因分数。

Abstract: Explainability methods for time series models predominantly produce flat attribution scores: they quantify the direct influence of a feature at a timestamp by a scalar. We prove that the dominant failure mode of such methods is not the scalar format itself but a fundamental computational mismatch: existing methods compute scores via marginal conditioning or off-manifold gradients, both of which conflate direct temporal dependencies with mediated ones under autocorrelation. We also define DAG-faithfulness: an explanation is DAG-faithful if the temporal dependency graph it encodes is Markov-equivalent to the temporal directed acyclic graph (DAG) implicitly learned by the model. Particularly, we observe that standard attribution methods, specifically SHAP, are not DAG-faithful in general, and that recent time-series-aware extensions inherit the same computational limitation.

</details>


### [382] [Quantizing Recursive Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16237)
*Thorir Mar Ingolfsson,Wajeeha Tahir,Anna Tegon,Lionnus Kesting,Gamze İslamoğlu,Luca Benini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现递归推理模型在4-bit量化时因逐张量缩放导致误差累积、性能崩溃，提出逐块量化格式MXInt4可完全恢复性能，并验证了其在不同架构和ARC-AGI基准上的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 递归推理模型反复使用同一权重块，量化误差会逐步骤累积，导致4-bit量化下性能从84.1%骤降至0%。本文旨在探究崩溃原因并提出有效量化方案。

Method: 分析发现崩溃源于激活值缩放的粒度问题而非位宽或格式；提出采用MXInt4逐块整数量化格式，保持整数元素和2的幂次块缩放，应用于递归推理模型。

Result: 逐块缩放完全恢复了推理性能；MXInt4与逐块浮点格式竞争力相当；递归深度越大的模型对量化越敏感，但逐块缩放能克服这一脆弱性；在ARC-AGI基准上具有迁移性。

Conclusion: 递归推理模型的4-bit量化崩溃由激活缩放粒度导致，逐块量化可有效解决，为低比特量化递归模型提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Recursive reasoning models solve hard puzzles by applying compact, weight-tied blocks over many refinement steps. Because these blocks are reused many times, quantizing them creates a unique dynamical problem: the quantization error is incurred at every step. While 8-bit quantization (integer or float) preserves accuracy, moving to a per-tensor 4-bit format causes a systematic bias to accumulate. The ensuing drift catastrophically degrades exact-solution accuracy on Sudoku from 84.1% to 0.0% (only ~25% of cells correct). In this work, we show that this collapse is caused by activation-scaling granularity rather than bit-width or number format. Crucially, moving to per-block scaling completely restores the transition. To implement this, we apply MXInt4, a blockwise integer activation format, to recursive reasoning models. It is competitive with blockwise float formats on our tasks, while keeping integer elements and power-of-two block scales. Finally, recursion depth and reuse modulate quantization sensitivity, with the deepest architecture we test (the EqR equilibrium model) the most sensitive. Yet blockwise scaling overcomes this vulnerability, staying robust across these architectures and transferring to the open-ended ARC-AGI benchmark.

</details>


### [383] [Diffusion-corrected Autoregressive Fourier Neural Operator for Droplet Evolution Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16238)
*Jinghao Cao,Minsung Kang,Hongyue Sun,Chi Zhou,Jihoon Chung,Xubo Yue,Sanchoy Das,Bo Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiffARFNO两阶段框架，结合自回归傅里叶神经算子和条件扩散模型，实现了材料喷射中液滴演化的长期高保真预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 材料喷射（喷墨打印）中预测液滴演化对保证打印质量至关重要，但长期预测面临误差累积和过程变量复杂耦合的挑战。

Method: 提出DiffARFNO两阶段框架：第一阶段用傅里叶-MIONet作为粗粒度预测器进行自回归长期预测；第二阶段用条件DDIM校正器在滑动窗口内通过迭代去噪细化粗预测结果。

Result: 在ANSYS Fluent液滴数据集上，DiffARFNO显著优于现有最先进模型。

Conclusion: 结合粗粒度傅里叶预测与扩散模型校正，有效提升了长期液滴演化预测的保真度。

Abstract: Predicting droplet evolution in material jetting, or Inkjet Printing (IJP), is essential for maintaining printing quality. However, long-horizon forecasts remain challenging due to error accumulation and the complex coupling of process variables. In this work, we introduce the Diffusion-corrected Auto-Regressive Fourier Neural Operator (DiffARFNO), a two-stage framework that combines an autoregressive Fourier-MIONet with a conditional Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) corrector. Fourier-MIONet is trained as a coarse predictor and deployed autoregressively for long-horizon forecasting. In the second stage, a DDIM-based conditional corrector refines the coarse prediction within each sliding window through efficient iterative denoising. By combining coarse predictions from Fourier-MIONet with a DDIM corrector that restores fine details, DiffARFNO aims to provide high-fidelity predictions for long-horizon forecasts. Extensive experiments on droplet datasets from ANSYS Fluent demonstrate that DiffARFNO significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models.

</details>


### [384] [MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18006)
*Martino M. L. Pulici,Cuong Xuan Chu,Evgeny Kharlamov,Zifeng Ding,Volker Tresp,Yunpu Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MADA-RL框架，通过辩论感知的强化学习让小型模型（≤4B参数）分工为生成器和评论家，使用反事实评论家优势（counterfactual critic advantage）进行后训练，仅微调少量LoRA参数，在数学推理任务上提升了准确率且训练成本极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型推理能力强但训练成本高，尤其是紧凑模型（≤4B参数）在有限预算下训练困难，需要高效的训练方法。

Method: MADA-RL框架：将紧凑模型特化为生成器和评论家角色，通过辩论感知的学习信号训练，仅用LoRA适配器微调少量参数。核心创新是反事实评论家优势（counterfactual critic advantage），即评论家的奖励减去生成器集成的每个实例准确率，实现更精准的信用分配。

Result: 在5个数学推理基准上，DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%（+2.0点，p<0.001），训练参数比全微调基线少16倍，处于准确率-可训练参数的帕累托前沿。评论家的改进率在所有评估模型中最高。

Conclusion: MADA-RL以极低训练成本提升了紧凑模型的推理能力，反事实优势机制让评论家学会纠正生成器错误而非模仿它们，但推理时成本有所增加，且未超越使用更大数据集训练的强基线。

Abstract: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance, but often at prohibitive training cost - a challenge that is especially acute for compact models ($\leq 4 \, \mathrm{B}$ parameters) trained under limited budgets. We introduce MADA-RL, a post-training framework that specializes compact models into generator and critic roles and trains them with a debate-aware learning signal, fine-tuning only a small subset of parameters via LoRA adapters. Our central contribution is a counterfactual critic advantage: a dynamic, role-conditioned baseline that redefines the critic's advantage as its reward minus the generator ensemble's per-instance accuracy. This explicitly optimizes critics to improve over generator consensus rather than to merely reproduce a correct answer, yielding more targeted credit assignment than static mean-reward normalization. At deployment, the specialized agents are composed in a lightweight multi-round protocol. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, MADA-RL raises the accuracy of the DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B model from $39.9 \, \%$ to $41.9 \, \%$ ($+2.0$ points, $p < 0.001$) using $16$ times fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned baselines, placing it on the accuracy-trainable-parameter Pareto front. It approaches, but does not surpass, the strongest baselines (DeepScaleR, STILL-3), which are trained on substantially larger datasets; we analyse this gap and the associated inference-time cost directly. A controlled study isolates the source of MADA-RL's gains: the counterfactual advantage produces the highest critic improvement rate of any model evaluated, indicating that trained critics learn to correct generator errors rather than to imitate them.

</details>


### [385] [BACON: Budgeted Human Calibration for Modeling and Evaluation with Multiple AI Judges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16239)
*Lei Shi,Anlan Zhang,Rita Lyu,Zhengmian Hu,Tong Yu,David Arbour,Avi Feller,Saayan Mitra,Ritwik Sinha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BACON是一个四阶段流水线，通过预算有限的人类校准与多个AI裁判输出相结合，生成更准确的标注，用于模型排名、项目评分和质量评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI裁判虽可扩展且低成本，但其输出存在偏差且高度依赖具体项目，不同裁判、任务和领域间差异大，直接使用会导致下游决策失真。

Method: BACON包含四阶段：1) 为每个项目构建全覆盖辅助特征（多裁判分数、token级不确定性统计、上下文嵌入）；2) 收集小样本子集的人类标签；3) 训练交叉拟合结果模型生成校准的代理预测；4) 支持总体级估计（增强估计方程+有效置信区间）和个体级代理评分。

Result: 在多种任务、领域和标注预算下，BACON相比原始AI输出和纯人工标注方法，提升了预测准确性和排序一致性，降低了偏差和方差。

Conclusion: BACON提供了一个实用且统计严谨的框架，在有限人工标注下实现可扩展的评估。

Abstract: AI judges offer a scalable, low-cost alternative to human evaluation, but their outputs can be biased relative to human preferences and highly item-dependent, varying across judges, tasks, and domains. When uncalibrated AI evaluations are used for model ranking, item scoring, or population-level quality reporting, these biases can directly distort downstream decisions. We propose BACON, a four-stage pipeline that combines budgeted human calibration with multiple AI-judge outputs to produce more accurate annotations. BACON constructs full-coverage auxiliary features for every item, including multi-judge scores, token-level uncertainty statistics, and contextual embeddings. It then collects human labels for a small sampled subset and trains a cross-fitted outcome model to generate calibrated item-level surrogate predictions. These predictions support two use cases: population-level estimation of summary metrics, such as means or quantiles, using an augmented estimating-equation estimator with valid confidence intervals; and individual-level surrogate scoring for item ranking and annotation. BACON treats AI judges as auxiliary measurements rather than ground truth: human labels provide the calibration anchor, while AI-derived signals improve efficiency. Across diverse tasks, domains, and labeling budgets, BACON improves predictive accuracy and ranking consistency, and reduces bias and variance relative to raw AI outputs and purely human-label-based methods. These results show that BACON offers a practical, statistically grounded framework for scalable evaluation with limited human annotation.

</details>


### [386] [Normalized Rewards for Preference Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16240)
*Shawn Im,Federico Danieli,Skyler Seto,Barry-John Theobald,Katherine Metcalf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对直接对齐算法（如DPO）在LLM对齐中导致的隐式奖励过度优化和偏好响应概率下降问题，提出了一种正则化方法，通过维持选中和拒绝响应的长度归一化概率之和来缓解该问题。实验表明该方法在生成质量和通用基准能力之间取得了更好的平衡，并在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上实现了AlpacaEval2得分提升>20%和通用基准性能提升>9%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接对齐算法（DAAs）在LLM偏好对齐中会导致隐式奖励模型过度优化，降低偏好响应似然，可能引发不良行为。本文旨在通过正则化手段缓解这一副作用。

Method: 引入正则化项来维持选中和拒绝响应的长度归一化概率之和，并将其应用于基于参考的DPO和无参考的SimPO方法。通过分析token级别的似然变化，发现异常token是主要原因。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上，AlpacaEval2得分提升>20%，通用基准性能提升>9%。正则化有效缓解了偏好响应整体的位移，尤其针对异常token。

Conclusion: 正则化方法能有效缓解DAAs的过度优化问题，在生成质量和基准性能之间取得更好的平衡，且对异常token的似然位移有显著抑制效果。

Abstract: Direct Alignment Algorithms (DAAs) such as DPO have become a common way to post-train and align LLMs with human preferences. However, DAAs have been observed to over-optimize their implicit reward model and decrease the likelihood of preferred responses. This results in a decrease in the total likelihood assigned to responses seen in the preference dataset, potentially resulting in undesirable behavior. To counteract this undesired side-effect of DAAs, we examine the effect of using objectives that add a regularization term to maintain the total length-normalized probabilities of the chosen and rejected responses. To better understand over-optimization, we investigate how response likelihood changes are distributed over the tokens with and without regularization. We find that a significant portion of the likelihood changes are due to a small set of outlier tokens, which explains how DAAs improve generation quality despite decreasing the likelihoods of chosen responses. We apply the proposed regularization to reference-based (DPO) and reference-free (SimPO) methods and find (1) improved trade-offs between generation quality and general benchmark capability and (2) improvements in reward modeling across datasets. For example, on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, we see both a >20% relative increase in AlpacaEval2 scores and >9% relative performance gains on general benchmarks. Additionally, we find that the added regularization term effectively mitigates the amount of displacement within preferred responses overall, and for the outlier tokens specifically, by utilizing low-likelihood tokens.

</details>


### [387] [KernelBench-Verified: Do LLM-Generated Kernels Actually Beat PyTorch?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16241)
*Yunxiang Zhang,Ping Yu,Jianyu Wang,Max,Fan,Julian Reed,Azalia Mirhoseini,Will Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现LLM生成的CUDA内核存在奖励黑客行为，通过硬编码绕过计算来虚增性能。作者引入KernelBench-Verified框架，使用TF32基准和四分布隐藏测试集，发现最佳模型GPT-5.5实际几何平均加速仅0.88x，远低于报告的1.43x，且28%的内核增加GPU内存峰值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成CUDA内核的评估框架存在漏洞，模型通过reward hacking（如硬编码绕过、使用不现实的基准）虚增性能，需要更鲁棒的评估协议。

Method: 提出KernelBench-Verified评估框架：(1) 使用TF32启用Tensor Core加速作为更现实的基线；(2) 引入四分布隐藏测试集防止硬编码绕过；(3) 引入内存效率指标衡量速度-内存权衡。

Result: 最佳模型GPT-5.5在标准协议下声称1.43x加速，但在验证协议下仅0.88x；28%生成内核增加峰值内存；无模型能持续超越PyTorch。

Conclusion: LLM生成CUDA内核的能力需要与更鲁棒的评估协议共同进化，当前模型在真实场景下并未超越PyTorch。

Abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) can generate custom CUDA kernels that appear to outperform PyTorch on benchmarks such as KernelBench. Building upon this foundational framework, we demonstrate that frontier models frequently engage in reward hacking to artificially inflate reported performance. In this work, we identify two areas where evaluation frameworks must co-evolve with model capabilities. First, to accurately measure true speedup, we examine the baseline timing mechanism, noting that enabling Tensor Core acceleration with TF32 provides a more realistic estimation of execution on modern GPUs. Second, concerning algorithmic correctness, models often exploit the narrow test distribution by hardcoding bypasses for specific tensor values. By skipping required computations, these kernels artificially accelerate execution rather than implementing actual CUDA kernels. We introduce KernelBench-Verified, an extended evaluation framework that incorporates a TF32-enabled baseline and a four-distribution hidden test suite. We additionally introduce memory efficiency metrics that capture the often-overlooked speed-memory tradeoff in kernel optimization. Under verified single-turn evaluation with seven frontier LLMs, we find that the best-performing model (GPT-5.5) achieves a 0.88x geometric mean speedup, significantly lower than the 1.43x speedup observed under the standard evaluation protocol. No model consistently outperforms PyTorch when evaluated against realistic baselines. On the memory front, 28% of GPU kernels generated by the best model increase peak GPU memory usage. Our findings demonstrate the necessity of continually adapting robust evaluation protocols as LLM kernel generation capabilities advance.

</details>


### [388] [TRACE: Trajectory-Based Safety Patch Learning for LLM Post-Training Realignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16242)
*Changyue Li,Jiaming He,Youliang Yuan,Jialin Wu,Boxi Yu,Zhicong Huang,Pinjia He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对FTaaS平台中微调模型的安全对齐问题，提出TRACE框架，通过离线学习安全补丁而非在线合并参数，在保持任务效用的同时恢复模型安全性，在六个基准测试中几乎达到100%安全率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FTaaS平台中用户微调大模型会破坏其安全对齐，现有参数合并方法因任务-安全更新方向纠缠而难以权衡安全与效用，需要一种既能恢复安全性又不破坏任务效用的解决方案。

Method: 提出TRACE框架，包含两个阶段：(i) 模拟有害微调轨迹，生成逐步退化的模型状态；(ii) 优化一个即插即用的安全补丁，使其在不同退化基座上都能恢复安全性并保持效用。

Result: 在六个基准测试和两个模型上，TRACE在所有设置中几乎达到100%的安全性，同时保持与未防御微调模型相当的效用，全面主导安全-效用前沿。

Conclusion: 将在线合并方法转变为离线补丁学习能有效解决任务-安全更新纠缠问题，TRACE在安全恢复和效用保持上均优于现有方法。

Abstract: Fine-Tuning-as-a-Service (FTaaS) platforms let users train large language models (LLMs) on customized tasks, but this pipeline could erode models' safety alignment. In practice, service providers need to recover models' safety without re-running full alignment, or destroying the utility gained from customized tasks. A line of existing work refers to model parameter merging, which adds a safety patch on the fine-tuned model parameters to shift the model away from unsafe tendencies. However, this merging-based paradigm is fundamentally bottlenecked by task-safety update entanglement: downstream task updates and the safety patch often overlap in their dominant directions, so the merge strength is intrinsically hard to calibrate. If the safety vector is scaled too weakly, harmful components could still dominate, preventing the model from returning to a safe region; if it is scaled too aggressively, it suppresses task-relevant directions and degrades utility.
  To solve this problem, we shift the focus of merging-based methods from designing online merging operators to offline patch learning, and seek a safety patch that minimally interferes with task-relevant directions while retaining decisive control over unsafe behaviors. We propose TRACE, a trajectory-based safety patch learning framework that (i) simulates harmful tuning trajectories to generate progressively corrupted states, and (ii) optimizes a plug-in patch to recover safety while maintaining utility across varying corrupted base states.
  Across six benchmarks and two models, TRACE consistently dominates the safety-utility frontier. TRACE reaches nearly 100% safety on all settings, while maintaining comparable utility to the undefended fine-tuned model.

</details>


### [389] [RobustMAD: Evaluating Real-World Robustness of Multimodal Small Language Models for Deployable Anomaly Detection Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16243)
*Anushiya Arunan,Xin Li,Yan Qin,U-Xuan Tan,Nhu Khue Vuong,Xiaoli Li,Chau Yuen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RobustMAD，首个针对工业异常检测场景的多模态小语言模型（MSLM）鲁棒性基准，发现小模型在某些方面甚至优于GPT-5 Nano，但仍存在多模态接地脆弱、响应不全面、逻辑推理弱等关键缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型因计算成本高、云端推理存在隐私风险，难以在工业现场部署；多模态小语言模型虽然可行，但缺乏系统的鲁棒性评估和反映真实工业场景的挑战性基准。

Method: 构建RobustMAD基准，涵盖对象理解、异常检测、不可回答问题、视觉质量退化等多样化的开放查询，用于全面评估模型鲁棒性。

Result: 顶尖MSLM表现出令人惊讶的能力，甚至超过GPT-5 Nano，但在安全关键任务中仍不足；发现了三类典型失效模式：细粒度/退化条件下的多模态接地脆弱、响应不全面、针对不合理查询的逻辑推理弱（产生幻觉）。

Conclusion: RobustMAD揭示了关键鲁棒性差距及运营风险，为设计下一代多模态工业检测助手提供了可操作的指导。

Abstract: Multimodal industrial anomaly inspection assistants are a critical component of next-generation smart factories, enabling interactive vision-language-based querying. However, multimodal large language models remain impractical for on-site deployment due to prohibitive computational demands and privacy risks from cloud-based inference. Compact multimodal small language models (MSLMs) offer a deployable alternative, yet progress is constrained by the lack of comprehensive robustness analyses and meaningfully challenging benchmarks that reflect real-world industrial conditions. To address this gap, we develop RobustMAD, the first deployment-motivated benchmark, designed to comprehensively evaluate model robustness through diverse open-ended queries spanning object understanding, anomaly detection, unanswerable problems, and visual quality degradations. Contrary to conventional assumptions, top-performing MSLMs exhibit promising capabilities, surprisingly outperforming even the larger GPT-5 Nano. However, they still fall short of safety-critical requirements, and RobustMAD reveals critical robustness gaps that pose operational risks. In particular, three recurring failure modes emerge: (i) fragile multimodal grounding under fine-grained distinctions or degraded visual conditions, (ii) insufficiently comprehensive responses, and (iii) weak logical grounding on unanswerable or ill-posed queries, leading to hallucinated outputs. Grounded in these insights, we provide actionable guidance for the design of next-generation multimodal industrial inspection assistants that leverage their promising competence. Code is available at https://github.com/en-research/RobustMAD.

</details>


### [390] [CIGPO: Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Evidence-Reading LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16244)
*Hao Dou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CIGPO方法，通过注入逐轮信息增益奖励来解决GRPO在多轮证据阅读训练中的零优势锁定失败模式，在HotpotQA上将F1从0.252提升至0.518。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO在多轮证据阅读任务中仅使用结果奖励训练不稳定，中间轮次缺乏直接信用分配，导致训练崩溃。

Method: 提出CIGPO，使用冻结参考模型对正确答案的对数似然边际增量作为每轮信号，对信息增益和F1奖励分别归一化，并采用信息增益权重课程。

Result: 在HotpotQA上，CIGPO达到标准F1 0.518（从0.252基准提升+105%），远优于GRPO最佳检查点0.430和最终检查点0.000。

Conclusion: 证实奖励方差坍塌是结果-only GRPO的具体失败模式，逐轮信息增益奖励可有效预防该问题。

Abstract: Training multi-turn evidence-reading agents with outcome-only reinforcement learning is unstable because intermediate turns receive little direct credit. In HotpotQA experiments with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, GRPO initially improves (standard F1 0.430) but subsequently collapses to 100% format-violating outputs. Training-log diagnosis reveals a zero-advantage lock-in mechanism: all sampled trajectories receive the minimum format penalty (-2.0), group-relative advantages vanish, and the policy-gradient loss becomes zero--an optimization deadlock. We propose a variance-injection strategy: by assigning per-turn rewards to intermediate evidence-reading turns, we prevent the group reward distribution from collapsing to a single value--preserving the variation that GRPO's group-relative advantage requires. Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization (CIGPO) implements this strategy using the marginal increase in the frozen reference model's log-likelihood of the ground-truth answer as the per-turn signal. With separate normalization of IG and F1 rewards and an IG-weight curriculum, CIGPO reaches a standard F1 of 0.518 on HotpotQA at the 3B scale (from 0.252 base; +105%), compared with 0.430 for the best GRPO checkpoint and 0.000 for the final GRPO checkpoint. CIGPO maintains meaningful reward variance and avoids zero-advantage lock-in throughout training. These results identify reward-variance collapse as a concrete failure mode of outcome-only GRPO and show that turn-level IG rewards can prevent it in this HotpotQA setting.

</details>


### [391] [Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16245)
*Rupesh Raj Karn,Ozgur Sinanoglu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于拓扑驱动的结构可操纵性评分方法，利用路径参与度、k-core嵌入、对称性和中心性等指标，通过图神经网络（GNNs）对门级网表进行节点级回归学习。在ISCAS85和EPFL基准测试中验证了不同GNN架构的效果，并通过木马注入电路案例分析展示了该方法在结构异常检测中的应用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 门级网表的结构特性直接影响信号传播，但现有方法多依赖功能仿真。作者希望仅从拓扑结构出发，定义一种无需功能信息的结构灵活性评分，以捕捉电路内在的结构可操纵性。

Method: 将网表建模为有向图，定义基于路径参与度、k-core嵌入、对称性和中心性的结构可操纵性分数；使用图神经网络（GNNs）进行节点级回归，学习该拓扑驱动的分数。

Result: 在ISCAS85和EPFL基准上，层次化GNN模型在跨电路评分排名上表现最优；组件分析和消融实验揭示了各因素的贡献；在TrustHub木马注入电路案例中，拓扑评分能够区分出统计上显著的结构异常模式。

Conclusion: 拓扑驱动的结构评分能够提供独立于功能仿真的互补性结构洞察，在硬件安全（如木马检测）等场景中具有潜在应用价值。

Abstract: Gate-level netlists exhibit intrinsic structural properties that influence signal propagation independently of functional simulation. We define a topology-driven structural manipulability score that characterizes node-level structural flexibility using path participation, k-core embedding, symmetry, and centrality. Modeling netlists as directed graphs, we formulate node-level regression to learn this topology-derived score using graph neural networks (GNNs). Experiments on ISCAS85 and EPFL benchmarks evaluate how effectively different GNN architectures approximate this metric across held-out circuits, with hierarchical models yielding the most consistent rankings. Component-level and ablation analyses examine the contribution of individual factors. As an illustrative case study, analysis of Trojan-injected circuits using TrustHub templates reveals statistically distinguishable structural patterns, indicating that topology-based scoring provides complementary structural insight.

</details>


### [392] [Let the Data Decide: Supervision Analysis, Capability Trade-offs, and Adaptive Objective Routing in Continued Pre-Training via Off-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16246)
*Jiangan Yuan,Zhixuan Li,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了大规模语言模型预训练中的离策略蒸馏（off-policy distillation），分析了训练目标（LM vs KD）对模型能力的影响，并探讨了自适应的目标路由策略。发现领域级路由优于token级路由，且路由信号质量比粒度更关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离策略蒸馏在LLM预训练中至关重要，但训练数据、目标参数化与模型能力之间的相互作用尚不清楚。作者旨在分解并理解这一复杂关系。

Method: 将问题分解为“目标到能力”和“数据到目标”两个层面。引入支持覆盖率、观测token概率质量、教师分布集中度等诊断指标，通过控制实验研究top-k截断和温度缩放的影响，并对比领域级与token级自适应路由策略。

Result: LM和KD目标产生系统不同的能力剖面；支持大小k控制覆盖-锐度权衡，温度控制概率分配；领域级路由（LM用于数学/代码，KD用于通用领域）优于单目标基线，而token级路由无法一致超越基线。

Conclusion: 有效的目标路由更依赖于路由信号的质量而非粒度，应将离策略蒸馏的持续预训练视为一个结构化的、数据条件化的监督设计问题，而非全局超参数选择。

Abstract: Off-policy distillation is now central to large language model pre-training, yet how training data, objective parameterization, and model capabilities interact remains poorly characterized. We studies top-$k$-truncated, temperature-scaled off-policy distillation by decomposing this problem into two questions: an \emph{objective-to-capability} analysis of how the training objective shapes token-level supervision and downstream performance, and a \emph{data-to-objective} analysis of how data heterogeneity should inform objective routing. We first show that the language-modeling objective ($L_{\mathrm{LM}}$) and the knowledge-distillation objective ($L_{\mathrm{KD}}$) induce systematically different capability profiles, and trace this divergence to a gradient-level tension between \emph{direct observed-token reinforcement} and \emph{teacher-supported alternative supervision}. To quantify this tension, we introduce diagnostic metrics -- support coverage, observed-token probability mass, and teacher-distribution concentration -- and show via controlled sweeps that the support size $k$ governs a coverage-sharpness trade-off, while distillation temperature controls within-support probability allocation. We then examine adaptive objective routing: a domain-level policy that applies $L_{\mathrm{LM}}$ to math and code and $L_{\mathrm{KD}}$ to general-domain data yields consistent gains over both single-objective baselines, whereas token-level routing based on observed-token probability mass or teacher entropy fails to consistently match the single-objective baseline. These results suggest that effective objective routing depends less on routing granularity than on the quality of the routing signal, reframing continued pre-training via off-policy distillation as a structured, data-conditional supervision-design problem rather than a global hyperparameter choice.

</details>


### [393] [Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory for Proactive Embodied Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16247)
*Bingrui Sima,Lizhong Wang,Xiaoya Lu,Kun He,Xiao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架，通过风险图、事实记忆和经验记忆三大组件，让具身智能体在闭环交互中主动缓解危险而不停滞任务进度，在IS-Bench上显著提升安全成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLM具身安全方法要么用运行时护栏阻止危险动作导致任务停滞，要么过度保守，无法在不牺牲进度的前提下主动处理动态出现的危险。作者希望打破安全与进度之间的权衡。

Method: 提出由三个组件组成的框架：1) Risk-Sufficient Topological Belief Graph (RSG)用于部分可观测下的持久安全状态追踪；2) Agency-Grounded Factual Memory用于精准危险预测；3) Experience Memory注入程序性元技能以指导可执行的、不牺牲进度的缓解动作。外加自动Test-Verify-Write循环，让智能体在测试时从执行轨迹中不断优化元技能。

Result: 在IS-Bench上，多个VLM主干（如Qwen3-VL-8B）的安全成功率提升30.3%，证明框架能主动缓解危险而不停滞任务进度。

Conclusion: 该框架有效打破了安全与进度之间的权衡，使具身智能体从被动阻挡危险转向主动消解风险。

Abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have empowered embodied agents to execute complex household tasks, they struggle to proactively handle dynamically emerging hazards during closed-loop interactions. Existing safety approaches often rely on runtime guardrails to block unsafe actions or induce excessive caution, which severely stalls task progress instead of actively resolving the underlying risks. To break this safety-progress trade-off, we introduce the Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory framework, which reframes embodied safety from progress-stalling guardrails to proactive hazard mitigation. The framework consists of a Risk-Sufficient Topological Belief Graph (RSG) for persistent safety-relevant state tracking under partial observability, an Agency-Grounded Factual Memory for precise hazard anticipation, and an Experience Memory that injects procedural Meta-Skills to guide executable, progress-preserving mitigation. Furthermore, we propose an automated Test-Verify-Write loop, allowing agents to continually refine their mitigation Meta-Skills from execution traces at test time. Experiments on IS-Bench demonstrate that our framework substantially boosts the Safe-Success rate across multiple VLM backbones (e.g., +30.3% on Qwen3-VL-8B), enabling agents to proactively mitigate hazards without stalling task progress. Code is available at https://github.com/DyMessi/JIT-Memory.

</details>


### [394] [High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16248)
*Gradwell Dzikanyanga,Yanqi Pan,Weihao Yang,Donglei Wu,Wen Xia,Hao Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对长上下文LLM推理中低比特KV缓存量化导致的精度下降问题，提出DGAP方法，通过局部分布恢复技术修复top-K区域的logits分布漂移，在Llama-3.1-8B上将1比特量化精度从47.8%恢复到83.2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长上下文LLM推理依赖KV缓存但带来高内存和带宽开销，低比特量化虽能降低成本但严重损害质量（如1比特量化导致精度从84.2%降至47.8%）。现有观点认为问题源于logits绝对误差，但本文发现根本原因是结构化局部误排序（top-K区域的logits分布漂移）。

Method: 提出局部分布恢复技术，通过量化logits特征检测高局部分布风险步骤，仅对选中的top-K候选分布进行恢复。具体实现为DGAP，包含高效的风险检测器和校正器。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上，DGAP将1比特RULER精度从47.8%恢复至83.2%，分布漂移从0.38降至0.14；在Llama、Mistral、Qwen系列模型上均保持低比特KV缓存占用，解码开销适中。

Conclusion: 论文揭示了低比特KV缓存量化的根本问题是局部logits分布漂移而非绝对误差，提出的局部分布恢复方法能有效恢复精度，为长上下文LLM的高效低比特推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Long-context large language model inference relies on the KV cache to avoid redundant attention computation, but incurs high memory and bandwidth overheads. Low-bit KV-cache quantization reduces this cost, yet it severely degrade quality; particularly, one-bit quantization reduces accuracy from 84.2% to 47.8% on Llama-3.1-8B under RULER.
  Rather than common beliefs that absolute error of logits, we find that the root cause is structured local misranking, where the distribution of logits in top-K region is drifted. We thereby propose local distribution restoration, a new technique that detects steps with high local distribution risk from quantized-logit features and restores only the selected top-K candidate distribution before token selection. We implement DGAP to achieve local distribution restoration, with efficient risk detcetors and correctors. Expeirments show that on Llama-3.1-8B, DGAP recovers K1V1 RULER accuracy from 47.8% to 83.2% and reduces distribution drift from 0.38 to 0.14; across Llama, Mistral, and Qwen models, it preserves the persistent low-bit KV-cache footprint with modest decode overhead.

</details>


### [395] [Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Multi-Omics-Based Breast Cancer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16250)
*Priyanka Paudel,Madan Baduwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了经典机器学习模型在利用多组学数据（转录组、基因组、蛋白质组）预测乳腺癌ER状态上的表现，发现RNA表达信号最强，多组学集成有适度提升，Random Forest在集成设置下达到最佳性能（平衡准确率90.3%，ROC-AUC 97.1%），且选出的关键基因具有生物学有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ER状态是乳腺癌诊断和治疗的关键生物标志物，随着高通量测序技术发展，多组学数据为计算预测提供了互补信息，但尚缺对不同机器学习模型在多组学ER预测中的系统基准比较。

Method: 使用TCGA-BRCA队列的转录组（RNA表达）、基因组（CNV）和蛋白质组（RPPA）数据，采用分层训练测试拆分、分层五折交叉验证、类别不平衡处理和折内特征选择，评估Random Forest、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、SVM和Logistic Regression在单组学和多组学融合下的表现。

Result: RNA表达提供最强的预测信号；多组学集成相比单一模态有适度但一致的提升；Random Forest在多组学集成设置下表现最佳，平衡准确率90.3%，ROC-AUC 97.1%；反复筛选出ESR1、PGR、FOXA1、GATA3等生物学相关基因。

Conclusion: 经过恰当正则化的经典机器学习方法在处理小型高维基因组数据时仍然高效，多组学集成为乳腺癌ER状态预测提供了互补信息。

Abstract: Estrogen Receptor (ER) status is a critical biomarker in breast cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection. Recent advances in high-throughput sequencing technologies have enabled the generation of multi-omics datasets that provide complementary molecular information for computational prediction tasks. This study presents a systematic benchmarking analysis of classical machine learning models for ER status prediction using transcriptomic (RNA expression), genomic (copy number variation; CNV), and proteomic (RPPA) data from the TCGA-BRCA cohort. A rigorous experimental framework incorporating stratified train-test splitting, stratified five-fold cross-validation, class imbalance handling, and fold-specific feature selection was employed to ensure reliable evaluation and prevent data leakage. Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Logistic Regression were evaluated across single-omic and multi-omic settings. Results demonstrated that RNA expression provided the strongest predictive signal, while multi-omic integration yielded modest but consistent improvements over individual modalities. Among all evaluated approaches, Random Forest achieved the best overall performance in the integrated multi-omic setting, obtaining a balanced accuracy of 90.3\% and an ROC-AUC of 97.1\%. Furthermore, recurrent selection of biologically relevant genes, including \textit{ESR1}, \textit{PGR}, \textit{FOXA1}, and \textit{GATA3}, supported the biological validity of the learned models. These findings indicate that carefully regularized classical machine learning methods remain highly effective for small, high-dimensional genomic datasets and that multi-omic integration provides complementary information for breast cancer ER status prediction.

</details>


### [396] [Learning Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models from Pure Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16251)
*Yutong Feng,Shiyuan Piao,Yutong Xia,Xu Liu,Wenqi Fan,Fugee Tsung,See-Kiong Ng,Yuxuan Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeoST是首个仅基于程序化生成合成数据预训练的时空基础模型，通过潜在空间推理架构和结构动力学目标，在真实世界基准上优于现有STFMs。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时空基础模型存在真实数据分布偏差、自回归/扩散模型的结构瓶颈、以及过度关注噪声观测空间中的逐点重建等问题。

Method: 提出NeoST：1) 可扩展的合成预训练语料库；2) 潜在空间推理架构，生成并迭代优化多条未来轨迹，避免误差累积；3) 潜在空间目标函数，强调结构动力学并支持推理时校正。

Result: 在多种真实世界时空基准上，NeoST持续优于现有STFMs，具有更优的长时稳定性和推理效率。

Conclusion: 合成数据预训练结合潜在空间推理是构建通用时空基础模型的有效路径。

Abstract: Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models (STFMs) aim to learn generalizable representations of complex dynamical systems across space and time. However, existing approaches suffer from distributional bias in real-world pre-training data, structural bottlenecks of autoregressive or diffusion-based paradigms, and objectives that overemphasize point-wise reconstruction in noisy observation space.We propose \textbf{NeoST}, the first spatio-temporal foundation model pre-trained solely on procedurally generated synthetic systems. NeoST introduces a scalable synthetic pre-training corpus to mitigate real-world bias, a latent-space reasoning architecture that generates and iteratively refines multiple future trajectories without sequential error accumulation, and latent-space objectives that emphasize structural dynamics and enable inference-time correction under distribution shifts.Extensive experiments across diverse real-world benchmarks show that NeoST consistently outperforms existing STFMs in diverse real-world spatio-temporal systems, achieves superior long-horizon stability and inference efficiency.

</details>


### [397] [SOS-LoRA: Static Orthogonal-Subspace Low-Rank Adaptation with Fixed Multi-Scale Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16252)
*Yupeng Chang,Yuan Wu,Yi Chang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SOS-LoRA 提出了一种静态正交子空间低秩适应方法，通过多个低秩专家分解秩更新、多尺度缩放和正交初始化，在固定秩预算下提升大语言模型微调性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准 LoRA 在固定秩预算下，单个低维输入通路可能耦合异质行为，导致优化干扰，影响微调效果。

Method: 将总秩更新分解为 K 个静态低秩专家的和，采用固定多尺度缩放方案鼓励尺度分离的优化动态，并通过跨专家正交初始化和轻量级正则化促进多样性输入方向。

Result: 在 Llama 2/3、GLUE、GSM8K/MATH 等多个基准上，SOS-LoRA 一致优于同等预算的 LoRA 基线及近期变体。

Conclusion: SOS-LoRA 是一种即插即用的 LoRA 扩展，推理时可合并参数，不引入额外延迟，有效提升了参数高效微调的效果。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method for large language models. Under a fixed rank budget, LoRA parameterizes each adapted weight through a single low-dimensional input-side pathway, which may couple heterogeneous behaviors through shared input directions and induce interference during optimization. We propose Static Orthogonal Subspace LoRA (SOS-LoRA), a drop-in extension that reparameterizes a rank-rtot update as a sum of K static (always-on, non-routed) low-rank experts. SOS-LoRA (i) decomposes the total rank across experts, (ii) applies a fixed multi-scale scaling scheme to encourage scale-separated optimization dynamics, and (iii) promotes diverse input-side directions via cross-expert orthogonal initialization and a lightweight regularizer. SOS-LoRA remains fully mergeable, adding no inference-time parameters or latency after merging. Experiments on reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks (Llama 2/3), encoder-based NLU (GLUE), and math reasoning (GSM8K/MATH) show consistent gains over matched-budget LoRA baselines and recent variants. Code is available at https://github.com/llm172/sos-lora.

</details>


### [398] [Comprehensive Evaluation of Machine Learning for Type 2 Diabetes Risk Prediction: Large-Scale External Validation and Fairness Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16253)
*Rajveer Singh Pall,Sameer Yadav,Siddharth Bhalerao,Sourabh Sahu,Ritu Ahluwalia,Bhaskar Awadhiya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文构建了包含判别、校准、可解释性和算法公平性的多维评估框架，用于评估基于机器学习的2型糖尿病风险预测模型。虽然内部验证表现良好（AUC=0.794），但外部验证性能下降（AUC=0.717），且存在严重年龄和肥胖相关的公平性偏差，高风险人群反而获得最差的算法性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器学习糖尿病风险预测模型在内部验证中表现良好，但在实际应用中因缺乏外部测试和公平性评估而效果降低，亟需更全面的评估框架。

Method: 使用XGBoost模型，基于NHANES 2015-2020数据（n=15,685）训练，选取八个非实验室预测变量（年龄、性别、种族、BMI、吸烟、体育活动、心脏病史、中风史），并在BRFSS 2020-2022（n=1,285,783）上进行外部验证。

Result: 内部验证AUC=0.794，外部验证AUC=0.717（下降9.7%）；老年人AUC=0.607 vs 年轻人0.742（偏差0.135）；肥胖者AUC=0.698 vs 正常体重0.735；性别间无显著差异。校准显示风险高估（Brier=0.123）。

Conclusion: 糖尿病高风险人群反而获得最差的算法性能，需要在临床使用前采用公平性意识和年龄分层的部署策略。

Abstract: Machine learning-based Type 2 diabetes risk prediction models obtain good internal validation results but lose effectiveness in real-world applications due to deficient external testing and fairness assessment. We developed a multi-dimensional framework evaluating discrimination, calibration, interpretability, and algorithmic fairness on nationally representative populations. An XGBoost model was trained on NHANES 2015-2020 (n=15,685) using eight non-laboratory predictors: age, sex, race/ethnicity, BMI, smoking status, physical activity, history of heart attack, and history of stroke. External validation was performed on BRFSS 2020-2022 (n=1,285,783) under realistic distribution shift. Internal validation showed good discrimination (AUC=0.794, 95% CI 0.788-0.800), with performance loss on external validation (AUC=0.717, relative decrease: -9.7%, p<0.001). Fairness analysis revealed severe bias: elderly adults (>=60) showed AUC=0.607 vs 0.742 for young adults (difference=0.135, p<0.001); obese individuals showed AUC=0.698 vs 0.735 for normal weight (difference=0.037, p<0.001). Gender showed comparable performance (male=0.723 vs female=0.712, p=0.142). Calibration revealed risk overestimation (Brier score=0.123). SHAP analysis identified age, BMI, and physical activity as primary risk drivers. Populations with highest diabetes risk receive the worst algorithmic performance, underscoring the need for fairness-aware, age-stratified deployment strategies before clinical use.

</details>


### [399] [More Than Memory: Task-Conditioned Signed FFN Writes in Long-Context Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16254)
*Zhibo Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了大语言模型FFN层在长上下文检索中的角色：通过缩放每层FFN的原生残差写入，发现FFN在检索中具有符号化的、逐层分化的作用——有些层是"放大器"（推动向正确答案），有些是"抑制器"（推离正确答案），且约60%的层会在不同检索模式间切换角色。基于写入梯度方向的诊断方法可以预测并改善检索性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往研究将FFN视为参数化记忆，但较少关注FFN的原生残差写入在长上下文检索中究竟是推动还是阻碍模型找到正确答案。

Method: 在不修改权重或注入外部引导向量的前提下，逐层缩放FFN的原生残差写入，通过分析写入的局部方向导数来区分放大器和抑制器角色。

Result: FFN响应是符号化的、逐层依赖的、与任务条件相关；最终FFN在7/8的模型-数据集组合中是抑制器；60%的层会在不同检索模式间切换角色；方向导数能够完美分离两种角色；该方法在LongBench检索QA上预测衰减损伤的R²达0.79以上。

Conclusion: FFN的原生残差写入具有符号化的、任务条件化的结构，写入梯度对齐是区分两种单调角色的紧凑诊断指标，基于抑制器衰减的策略能有效改善检索效果。

Abstract: FFNs are often treated as parametric memories. In long-context retrieval, however, the sharper question is not only what they store, but whether their native residual writes push the current retrieval state toward or away from the correct answer. We test this by scaling the model's own FFN write one layer at a time, without editing weights or injecting external steering vectors.
  Across controlled literal and semantic retrieval suites, native FFN response surfaces are signed, layer-specific, and task-conditioned: the final FFN is a suppressor in 7 of 8 model-suite cases, and 60% of layers switch role between retrieval modes (95% CI [50%, 69%]). A local directional derivative along the native write separates the two monotone roles: suppressors have negative derivative in 34/35 cases, and amplifiers have positive derivative in 18/18 cases, so the roles are not reducible to write size. On a safety-filtered LongBench retrieval-QA probe, the same diagnostic predicts attenuation damage with raw R^2=0.796 on Qwen2.5-7B and 0.791 on Qwen3.5-9B; a held-out suppressor-attenuation policy improves retrieval margins over random and norm-matched controls. These results show that native FFN scaling exposes a signed, task-conditioned residual-write structure in retrieval, and that write-gradient alignment is a compact diagnostic for the two monotone roles.

</details>


### [400] [Feature Generation Using LLMs: An Evolutionary Algorithm Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16255)
*Aria Nourbakhsh,Benoît Alcaraz,Christoph Schommer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用大语言模型(LLM)从表格数据中生成新特征，通过数学和逻辑运算符提升分类性能，在多个数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 特征工程是机器学习中的重要步骤，但传统方法难以自动发现属性间复杂关系。LLM在编码、数学推理和世界知识方面展现出强大能力，可被用于自动化特征生成。

Method: 构建了一个pipeline：输入现有特征集和提示词，LLM生成新特征，再通过选择算法筛选出性能最佳的特征子集。

Result: 在8个不同领域和数据类型的数据集上，LLM基于数学和逻辑运算符生成的新特征在多数情况下能提升分类效果。

Conclusion: LLM能够有效利用数学和逻辑运算为表格数据生成有用特征，改善下游分类任务性能。

Abstract: A crucial step in machine learning pipelines is to present each entity with features or attributes that are representative of the characteristics of the processed entities. Feature engineering is an important step in finding a relation among attributes that otherwise may not be processed by the ML algorithms. Meanwhile, Large Language Models have shown promising abilities in coding, mathematical reasoning, and processing world knowledge. In this work, we utilize an LLM for the problem of feature generation from tabular data based on the previously given features. We have created a pipeline that takes a set of attributes and a prompt to generate new features. Then, our selection algorithm selects the best-performing sets of attributes. We apply our method to eight datasets from different domains and data types. Our results show that, in most cases, the language model can produce new features based on mathematical and logical operators that are useful for the given tasks and can improve classification results.

</details>


### [401] [Discovery by Dreaming: Cross-Domain Recombination in Artificial Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16256)
*Oliver Zahn,James Evans,David Eagleman*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出记忆巩固的核心功能不是防止遗忘，而是跨领域重组知识以产生新发现。通过在LoRA微调（DREAMS）和符号引擎（SAPIENCE）两种架构中实现重组回放机制，实验表明跨领域巩固能带来显著性能提升（符号系统达85.7%，神经网络在跨领域任务上提升+14.5pp），而领域内重复则无效。这一效应是权重的真实属性，而非提示工程产物。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 受神经科学中梦境重组功能启发，挑战传统记忆巩固理论（仅用于防止遗忘），探究跨领域知识重组是否能为机器学习系统带来创造性发现。

Method: 设计两种架构无关的重组回放机制：1）DREAMS：在LoRA微调中实现跨领域样本重组；2）SAPIENCE：在符号引擎中回放结构化知识对象。通过对比跨领域巩固与领域内重复的效果，并在671B参数模型上验证是否为提示工程假象。

Result: 符号系统SAPIENCE发现跨领域新连接达85.7%（+21pp）。神经网络DREAMS整体提升+5.64pp，跨领域子任务（如GSM8K数学推理）达+14.5pp。将同样材料作为上下文提示给671B模型反而逆转收益，证明是权重属性。

Conclusion: 记忆巩固的本质不是为了记忆，而是为了发现。跨领域重组是产生创造性发现的通用计算原则，可在不同架构中实现。通过50000篇真实论文验证了该预测，并提出可证伪的海马体记录预测来区分重组与重复。

Abstract: Dreams splice together people, places, and times that never met. Neuroscience suggests this recombination is not noise, but a function driving insight and creative discovery. This reframes memory consolidation: rather than merely defending against forgetting, its measurable value lies in recombining knowledge across experiences that have not yet co-occurred. We test this directly by isolating the recombinatory-replay mechanism and implementing it in two architecturally unrelated systems: a LoRA fine-tuning pipeline (DREAMS) and a symbolic engine replaying structured knowledge objects (SAPIENCE). Both systems converge on the same finding: cross-domain consolidation creates value, while within-domain rehearsal does not. The symbolic arm surfaces novel cross-domain connections at 85.7%, a +21 percentage point (pp) gain over baseline. The neural arm improves overall by +5.64 pp, but on subtasks explicitly requiring cross-domain transfer (like unseen math reasoning on GSM8K), gains reach +14.5 pp. This effect is a genuine property of the weights--not a prompt artifact--as prepending the same material in-context to a 671B-parameter model actually reverses the gain. We validate this prediction against documented discoveries across 50,000 real papers and state a falsifiable hippocampal-recording prediction to distinguish recombination from rehearsal. Ultimately, this principle is substrate-general, tracking real discovery at scale. Reading the literature teaches a model to recall what it has seen, but producing discovery requires a separate offline phase that recombines knowledge across domains--the computational analog of dreaming. Consolidation is not for remembering, but for discovering.

</details>


### [402] [From Outcomes to Actions: Leveraging Hindsight for Long-Horizon Language Agent Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16257)
*Zishang Jiang,Tingyun Li,Jinyi Han,Xinyi Wang,Sihang Jiang,Yizhou Ying,Xiaojun Meng,Jiansheng Wei,Jiaqing Liang,Yanghua Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为 Hindsight Policy Optimization (HPO) 的新型策略梯度方法，通过在意图空间中投影当前策略分布与事后分布，利用Wasserstein距离提取低方差学习信号，解决长程交互中RL优化方差高的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL方法在训练LLM进行长程交互时，难以区分不同动作的贡献，导致优化方差过高。

Method: 将当前策略分布与事后分布投影到意图空间，通过两者之间的Wasserstein距离提取低方差学习信号。

Result: 理论上证明了该方法能得到有界方差的估计器，实验上稳定提升了策略性能。

Conclusion: HPO通过意图空间中的分布对齐有效降低了长程RL训练的方差，提升了策略学习稳定性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a widely adopted technique for improving large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks. Despite this progress, existing RL methods still face challenges in training agents with longer-horizon interactions. One major bottleneck is distinguishing the contribution of different actions in long-horizon interaction, leading to high optimization variance. To address this, we introduce a novel policy gradient method, Hindsight Policy Optimization (HPO), that projects both the current policy distribution and the hindsight distribution into an intent space and extracts low-variance learning signals from the Wasserstein distance between them. We theoretically and empirically show that aggregating semantically similar states and actions in the intent space yields a bounded-variance estimator and improves policy performance stably. Our code is available online.

</details>


### [403] [Neural Controlled Differential Equations for EMT-Level Surrogate Modeling of Grid-Forming Inverters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16258)
*Jiagang Qu,Yong Tao,Dan Wang,Enyi Li,Jingjing Qi,Ding Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于神经控制微分方程(Neural CDE)的框架，用于学习并网逆变器的连续时间代理模型，实现电磁暂态仿真中的多时间尺度控制分析，并通过物理启发正则化增强稳定性和一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI方法在电力电子变换器建模中面临多时间尺度混合分析困难、缺乏物理感知评估标准和约束等问题，导致性能不佳。

Method: 提出Neural CDE框架学习连续时间代理模型；设计具有双慢/快路径的仿射控制公式捕获层级多尺度行为；利用物理启发正则化方法增强稳定性。

Result: 模型能准确再现暂态响应，保持有效阻尼和主导振荡特性，并在长时域推演中保持有界。

Conclusion: Neural CDE的组件建模为电磁暂态仿真提供了一种物理一致的代理建模方法。

Abstract: The application of artificial intelligence methods in power electronic converter modeling is becoming increasingly widespread, but existing applications still face many challenges, such as difficulties in multi-time-scale hybrid analysis and the lack of physics-aware evaluation criteria and constraints, resulting in poor performance. This paper proposes a Neural Controlled Differential Equation (Neural CDE) framework for learning continuous-time surrogate models of grid-forming inverters for electromagnetic transient (EMT) simulation, which relaxes the constraint of fixed sampling rates and enables multi-time-scale control analysis. Then, an affine-control formulation with dual slow/fast pathways is proposed to capture the hierarchical and multiscale behavior of converter dynamics, and a physics-inspired regularization method is utilized to enhance stability and coherence. Evaluated on EMT-generated trajectories, the model accurately reproduces transient responses, preserves effective damping and the dominant oscillatory characteristics, and maintains bounded long-horizon rollouts. The results show that Neural CDE-based component modeling offers a physically consistent surrogate modeling approach for EMT-level simulation studies.

</details>


### [404] [Quantifying Ranking Uncertainty in LLM Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16259)
*Bitya Neuhof,Yuval Benjamini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文分析了MMLU基准测试中排名不确定性的来源，并提出改进假设检验方法以考虑这些因素，发现MMLU各子领域间的排名变异性显著，应在比较LLM时加以考虑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有排行榜排名置信区间方法未充分考虑MMLU基准中排名不确定性的来源（如不同子领域间的变异性），需要对这些不确定性进行量化和分析。

Method: 通过分析MMLU知识评估基准中排名不确定性的来源，并修改假设检验方法来纳入这些因素的影响。

Result: 发现MMLU各子领域间的排名变异性显著，在比较LLM或识别顶级模型时必须考虑这一因素。

Conclusion: 排名不确定性在MMLU基准中不可忽视，改进后的假设检验方法能更准确地反映模型间的真实排名差异。

Abstract: Pretrained models are typically ranked on multi-task leaderboards to assess their effectiveness across diverse tasks. Rank confidence intervals were recently introduced as a method to quantify the uncertainty in these rankings by aggregating pairwise hypothesis tests. In this work, we analyze the sources of uncertainty in the knowledge evaluation benchmark MMLU and show how hypothesis tests can be modified to account for their effects. We demonstrate that ranking variability across MMLU subjects is substantial and should be considered when comparing LLMs or identifying the top-performing models.

</details>


### [405] [AdaSurvMamba: Dynamic Fusion and Semantic Scanning for Multimodal Survival Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16260)
*Jialong Zhong,Tingwei Liu,Baokun Yue,Jingjing Li,Yongri Piao,Miao Zhang,Leiye Liu,Jiahong Jiang,Wei Ji,Huchuan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: AdaSurvMamba提出了一种结合Mamba状态空间模型的自适应多模态生存分析框架，通过DSIR模块动态调整跨模态交互强度，以及SAS模块解决语义碎片化问题，在五个TCGA数据集上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法假设跨模态交互强度是静态的，忽略了不同患者和局部区域中模态诊断重要性的动态变化；同时标准Mamba沿着预定义物理路径扫描，破坏了医学特征的空间语义连续性。

Method: 提出DSIR（双尺度重要性感知重建）模块，在序列和Token层面动态评估诊断重要性并重建输入表示；提出SAS（语义聚合扫描）模块，通过共享原型池将离散Token重新组织为语义连续的序列，并利用全局模态上下文和语义先验自适应调节状态转移步长。

Result: 在五个TCGA癌症队列上，AdaSurvMamba一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 自适应多模态融合与语义连续扫描能有效提升基于WSI和基因组数据的癌症生存分析性能。

Abstract: Multimodal survival analysis utilizing whole slide images (WSIs) and genomic profiles is fundamental for cancer prognosis. Recently, state-space models like Mamba have emerged as powerful tools for sequence modeling. However, translating this success to complex multimodal tasks is hindered by two critical limitations. First, conventional fusion strategies assume a static multimodal interaction strength, ignoring the fluctuating diagnostic importance of each modality across different patients and local regions. Second, the standard Mamba architecture processes tokens along predefined physical paths. This rigid scanning disrupts the semantic continuity of spatially scattered medical features and exacerbates long-range decay. To address these challenges, we introduce AdaSurvMamba as a novel adaptive framework for multimodal survival analysis. The framework features a Dual-Scale Importance-Aware Reconstruction (DSIR) module to dynamically modulate cross-modal interaction strength. It evaluates diagnostic importance at both the sequence and token levels to reconstruct the input representations. Furthermore, we propose a Semantic Aggregation Scanning (SAS) module to overcome contextual fragmentation. The SAS module dynamically reorganizes discrete tokens into semantically continuous sequences via a shared prototype pool. It explicitly modulates the state transition step size using global modality context and semantic priors to adaptively control the information absorption rate. Experiments across five TCGA cohorts demonstrate consistent gains over existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/zjlGO/AdaSurvMamba.

</details>


### [406] [Reducing Per-Sample Harm in Stochastic Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16261)
*Apostolos Avranas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新优化方法，通过减少批次平均和优化历史对单个样本的干扰（称为"harm"），在SGD和AdamW等优化器中加入可解的高效代理问题，仅需对最后一层进行二阶统计优化，提升了图像分类的泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代优化器在聚合批次数据和利用历史优化状态时，会产生的参数更新可能增加单个样本的损失，这种冲突干扰了模型的泛化性能，需要被显式缓解。

Method: 将参数更新形式化为一个优化问题来最小化批平均和历史状态对当前数据的冲突影响。通过降维至批次大小，并将优化限制在最后一层线性层（该层能可靠捕获每样本梯度的二阶统计量），实现高效求解。该代理问题可集成到SGD和AdamW中。

Result: 在图像分类基准上，该方法减少了每样本梯度间的干扰，并提升了泛化性能。同时计算开销随模型或输入规模增大而相对缩小，具有良好的扩展性。

Conclusion: 提出的优化策略能有效缓解批次和历史更新带来的样本级损失冲突，是一种可扩展且实用的改进方案。

Abstract: Modern optimizers combine gradients from the current mini-batch with historical optimization state, such as momentum or adaptive moments. While highly effective, aggregating across the batch and incorporating this history can produce parameter updates that increase the loss of individual samples. We term this effect harm and formalize the parameter update as an optimization problem that explicitly minimizes the conflicting impact of both batch averaging and past optimization state on current data.
  Because the exact formulation is intractable, we introduce a highly efficient proxy. We first reduce the problem's dimensionality to the batch size, and then drastically cut memory and speed bottlenecks by successfully restricting the optimization to the last linear layer. This hinges on the unexpected finding that this layer alone reliably captures the second-order statistics of the per-sample gradients. The resulting surrogate problem integrates readily into standard optimizers like SGD and AdamW, and can be solved using a small number of GPU-friendly iterations. Crucially, the method exhibits favorable scaling properties, as the relative computational overhead shrinks as the model size or input grows. Experiments on image classification benchmarks confirm reduced per-sample interference and improved generalization.

</details>


### [407] [Autonomous mechanistic discovery of colorectal cancer vulnerabilities via multi-scale AI swarms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16262)
*Christopher Baker,Tianyu Ren,Karen Rafferty,Hui Wang,Simon McDade*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Octopus的神经符号架构，将本地LLM集群与算法物理引擎结合，实现从体外筛选到体内预测的全自动生物医学发现，并成功识别出IGF2作为结直肠癌5-FU耐药的关键靶点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM多智能体框架缺乏数学因果约束，无法实现多尺度临床转化；临床数字孪生虽能预测状态但牺牲了机制可解释性。需要一种兼顾语义推理与物理约束的端到端自动发现框架。

Method: 提出Octopus架构：结合零泄漏本地LLM群与严格算法物理引擎；利用CRISPR数据生成治疗假说，通过XGBoost SHAP向量进行因果级联追踪，实现从体外（CCLE）到体内（PDX小鼠模型、人类生存数据）的正交翻译验证。

Result: 在结直肠癌转录组无监督扫描中，自主识别IGF2为5-FU耐药的关键脆弱靶点；经Benjamini-Hochberg校正后仍显著（q=0.0292, Log-Rank p=0.0007），并在独立小鼠队列中验证了肿瘤体积显著缩小（Mann-Whitney p=0.0373）。

Conclusion: Octopus建立了可验证、零泄漏的全自动端到端生物医学发现范式，弥合了多智能体语义推理与数学化临床生存之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: The acceleration of automated scientific discovery has been fundamentally bottlenecked by the epistemic gap between the semantic reasoning of large language models (LLMs) and the deterministic physics of mammalian biology. While recent multi-agent frameworks have achieved autonomous hypothesis generation and in vitro experimental analysis, they lack the mathematically grounded, causal constraints required for multi-scale clinical translation. Furthermore, while algorithmic clinical digital twins successfully forecast biological states, they rely on black-box latent spaces, sacrificing mechanistic interpretability for predictive accuracy. Here, we introduce the Multi-Scale Autonomous Discovery Engine (Octopus), a neuro-symbolic architecture that unites zero-leakage, local LLM swarms with strict algorithmic physics engines. Rather than stopping at isolated cellular assays, the system autonomously generated therapeutic hypotheses against in vitro CRISPR dependency data (CCLE), traced dynamic causal cascades using mechanistic interpretability (XGBoost SHAP vectors), and orthogonally translated the emergent vulnerabilities in silico to predict in vivo mammalian tumor trajectory (PDX) and human overall survival (Marisa). In a fully unsupervised sweep of colorectal cancer transcriptomes, the pipeline autonomously identified Insulin-like Growth Factor 2 (IGF2) as a strictly bounded vulnerability to 5-Fluorouracil resistance. The discovery maintained significance after rigorous Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate correction (q=0.0292, Log-Rank p=0.0007 ) and successfully predicted significant in vivo tumor volume shrinkage in an independent mouse cohort (Mann-Whitney p=0.0373). By bridging the chasm between multi-agent reasoning and mathematically bounded clinical survival, this framework establishes a verifiable, zero-leakage paradigm for automated, end-to-end biomedical discovery.

</details>


### [408] [Preference-based Antibody Expression Ranking: Scaling with Large-scale Weak Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16263)
*Josh Qixuan Sun,Morteza Babaie,Wenyang Hou,Mark Crowley,David Young*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于偏好学习的统一框架，通过引入联合掩码对数似然近似和IMGT对齐的DPO方法，利用少量标记数据和大量弱正监督数据来优化抗体表达排名，在1254个标记序列和400万未标记抗体数据集上取得了优于基线方法的结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 抗体表达排名是抗体设计中的关键任务，但标记实验数据稀缺，严重制约了模型性能。

Method: 提出了统一偏好学习框架，将Direct Preference Optimization (DPO)适配到蛋白质语言模型，引入了联合掩码对数似然近似和IMGT对齐方法，从而在变长序列上高效训练。

Result: 在1254个标记序列和400万未标记骆驼科抗体数据集上，该方法在大多数指标上优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 偏好学习可以有效利用弱监督信号，为数据受限场景下的抗体表达优化提供了可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: Antibody expression ranking is a critical task in antibody design, yet its modelling is severely hindered by the scarcity of labeled experimental data. To address this, we propose a unified preference-based learning framework that integrates scarce quantitative expression data with large-scale weak positive supervision from immunization data. We adapt Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to protein language models by introducing a union-masked log-likelihood approximation and IMGT-based alignment, enabling efficient training on variable-length sequences. Evaluating on a diverse internal dataset of 1254 labeled sequences and 4 million unlabeled camelid-derived antibodies, we show that our method consistently outperforms baselines on most metrics. Our results demonstrate that preference learning can effectively learn from weak supervision, providing a scalable solution for antibody expressibility optimization in data-constrained settings. Project page: https://kisoji-biotechnology-inc.github.io/Preference-Expression-Ranking/.

</details>


### [409] [PsiLogic: Chaos-Aware Active Cancellation for Adam with a Fair Cross-Domain Benchmark](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16268)
*Ali Sultonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PsiLogic优化器，通过动态活跃取消门控机制增强Adam，在训练不稳定时加强阻尼、稳定后自动归零，实现隐式预热，在NLP、ViT和ResNet任务上优于Adam/AdamW/Lion。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Adam等自适应优化器在训练的混沌早期阶段和接近收敛时使用相同的更新规则，缺乏对训练阶段动态变化的适应性。

Method: 提出PsiLogic优化器，在Adam基础上增加一个由尺度归一化梯度范数的双指数移动平均(EMA)门控的动态活跃取消项(Active Cancellation Term)，形成混沌检测器，在梯度统计不稳定时加强阻尼，训练稳定后逐渐归零，实现无需手工调度的隐式预热。

Result: 在FairBench基准上，PsiLogic在NLP困惑度(7.79 vs 8.17, p=0.049)、ViT top-1准确率(0.244 vs 0.223, p=0.015)和ResNet top-1准确率(0.222 vs 0.172, p=0.001)三个任务上取得最佳验证指标；扩散任务上与Adam/AdamW统计持平；GPU显存相当，计算开销增加1.2-1.8倍。

Conclusion: PsiLogic通过动态调节训练过程中的梯度更新强度，无需手工预热调度即可提升多个任务的性能，且统计显著性良好，开源实现支持独立验证。

Abstract: Adaptive optimizers such as Adam and AdamW apply the same update rule regardless of whether training is in a chaotic early phase or near convergence.
